burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; low population burden
burden.mortalityRate: Low with early therapy; higher in untreated severe forms

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical hypotonia/weakness plus genetic confirmation of SMN1 deletion

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high in specialized centers

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Genetic testing and neuromuscular centers widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Nusinersen/risdiplam and gene therapy where approved; multidisciplinary care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High cost and access variation across countries
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized neuromuscular networks and early treatment
